results.title: Mankato Habaneros beat Grand Forks Spitfires in slugfest
results.description: GRAND FORKS, N.D. — Runs were scored early and often as the Mankato Habaneros claimed a 16-12 road win over the Grand Forks Spitfires Monday.

results.title: US President Donald Trump Allowed By FIFA To Break Trophy Protocol In World Cup Final: Report
results.description: Donald Trump may present the trophy at the 2026 FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium, with FIFA allowing him to join celebrations, amid wider tournament controversies

results.title: Iran coach says team ordered out of US right after 2-2 draw with New Zealand in World Cup opener
results.description: The coach of Iran’s World Cup team says it was ordered to leave the U.S. and return to its training base in Mexico only a few hours after opening its politically charged tournament by playing to a 2-2 draw with New Zealand.
